title: Direct Materials Calculation: Calculate the direct materials cost if each unit requires 3...
summary: Calculate direct materials cost from units, material quantity, and cost per unit.
prompt: Calculate the direct materials cost if each unit requires 3 kg of material at a cost of $10 per kg for 1,000 units.
solution: Direct Materials Cost = Units * kg per unit * cost per kg = 1,000 * 3 * $10 = $30,000. This calculation is essential for budgeting (Page 51).
